rows.notes: Official FGS website example: Moderate to severe pain; cropped to cat photo only; for smoke/calibration only, not a scientific validation set. Variant: tight_content. Reference-only smoke/calibration image.
rows.pred_ear_position_evidence: Ears are visible and appear to be in a relaxed, forward position.
rows.pred_orbital_tightening_evidence: Eyes are partially closed or squinted, suggesting some degree of narrowing.
rows.pred_muzzle_tension_evidence: The muzzle shape shows some subtle tension or rounding consistent with a relaxed, resting expression.
rows.pred_whiskers_change_evidence: Whiskers are visible and appear naturally curved, not stiff or pulled.
rows.pred_head_position_evidence: The head is held in a resting position, aligned with the body.
